title: Daddy Escape
description: Daddy Escape-Save Pull Pin Out game is a unique hyper casual puzzle game. Use your brain to solve the tricky pin pull out puzzle game and get the daddy out before it’s too late. In this pull pin game, Help Daddy rescue to escape from the dangerous home be careful about Monsters, Villains, Bombs, Spike, Lava and all such dangerous obstacles. Its now up to your puzzle game critical thinking of how you will get the daddy out escape games and save him. If you like escape and pull the pin games, You will love this how-to loot - Save daddy brain puzzle. Let test your IQ with Daddy Escape game.
instructions: - Pull the pins in the right order and save the daddy - Just a small mistake can lose daddy - Train your brain with this daddy rescue game
